package.name: student_nodes_pkg
package.description:
THIS IS YOUR PACKAGE. Add your own ROS 2 nodes here.
It ships with a text publisher example, a fake temperature sensor, a telemetry CSV recorder, and an authoritative simulated vehicle. Because rosbridge exposes every topic to the browser, anything published here can be read by the React GUI. Copy an example, rename it, and register it in setup.py to create your own nodes.
